svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="J4rOrjZ5uEIYS-cAwV19"> <mxGraphModel dx="703" dy="970" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
!theme sketchy-outline
left to right direction

title <b>Use Case Diagram</b>

actor User #3498DB
actor Admin #E74C3C

rectangle System {
 (Upload Contract) #2ECC71
 (Generate Summary) #2ECC71
 (Analyze Risk) #2ECC71
 (Semantic Search) #2ECC71
 (View Results) #2ECC71
 (Manage System) #F39C12
}

User --> (Upload Contract)
User --> (Generate Summary)
User --> (Analyze Risk)
User --> (Semantic Search)
User --> (View Results)

Admin --> (Manage System)

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="s31tFLLTC1g4qOQDU-kv-4"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="532" width="268" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
